name: Cipher Studio — Research Agent v3 (Competitive Intelligence)

parameters.jsCode:
const dirItems = $('Fetch CEO Directives').all();
const directiveText = (dirItems.length > 0 && dirItems[0].json && !dirItems[0].json.code)
  ? dirItems.map(d => d.json.directive || '').filter(Boolean).join('. ')
  : 'No specific directives.';

const userLines = [
  'You are a marketplace intelligence researcher for Cipher Studio, a digital products business selling ebooks, spreadsheet templates, and Notion templates to freelancers and small business owners.',
  '',
  'CEO DIRECTIVES: ' + directiveText,
  '',
  'RESEARCH TASK: Search etsy.com directly — browse it as a human buyer and seller would. Find:',
  '',
  '1. TOP-SELLING CATEGORIES: Search etsy.com for "digital download business templates", "freelancer ebook", "spreadsheet templates small business", "Notion template productivity". Note which listings have the most sales (look for "bestseller" badges and high review counts).',
  '',
  '2. PRICE INTELLIGENCE: What price points appear most often for top-selling digital products on Etsy? What is the typical price for an ebook vs a spreadsheet template vs a Notion template?',
  '',
  '3. DEMAND-SUPPLY GAPS: Search for niches where buyers leave reviews saying they wished the product covered more, or where search results show few high-quality options.',
  '',
  '4. TRENDING SEARCHES: What digital product keywords are trending on Etsy right now in 2026? Look for recently added bestsellers and rising categories.',
  '',
  '5. COMPETITOR WEAKNESSES: Find top Etsy shops selling digital products to freelancers/small businesses. What negative reviews mention? What do their products lack?',
  '',
  'Return ONLY valid JSON array (no markdown fences):',
  '[{',
  '  "title": "Suggested product title",',
  '  "niche": "ebook_guide|ebook_bundle|spreadsheet_templates|notion_templates|business_documents",',
  '  "source": "etsy_marketplace",',
  '  "evidence": "specific Etsy data: competitor prices, review counts, bestseller count",',
  '  "competitive_advantage": "what gap Cipher Studio can fill",',
  '  "suggested_price": 12.99,',
  '  "estimated_demand": "high|medium|low",',
  '  "competition_level": "high|medium|low",',
  '  "keywords": ["etsy search terms"],',
  '  "urgency": "trending_now|growing|stable|seasonal",',
  '  "etsy_search": "exact phrase a buyer types into Etsy"',
  '}]',
  '',
  'Find 5-8 Etsy-specific opportunities with real data from etsy.com.'
];

const requestBody = JSON.stringify({
  model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6',
  max_tokens: 4096,
  tools: [{ type: 'web_search_20250305', name: 'web_search' }],
  messages: [{ role: 'user', content: userLines.join('\n') }]
});

return [{ json: { requestBody } }];

const dirItems = $('Fetch CEO Directives').all();
const directiveText = (dirItems.length > 0 && dirItems[0].json && !dirItems[0].json.code)
  ? dirItems.map(d => d.json.directive || '').filter(Boolean).join('. ')
  : 'No specific directives — use default research strategy.';

const userLines = [
  'You are a competitive intelligence researcher for Cipher Studio, a digital products business selling ebooks, spreadsheet templates, and Notion templates to freelancers and small business owners.',
  '',
  'CEO DIRECTIVES FOR THIS RESEARCH CYCLE:',
  directiveText,
  '',
  'RESEARCH TASKS (use web_search for each — be thorough):',
  '',
  '1. AMAZON KDP TRENDING: Find the top-selling ebooks on Amazon KDP in: AI tools for business, small business automation, freelancer productivity, passive income guides. Note title, price, review count, and what gap Cipher Studio could fill.',
  '',
  '2. GOOGLE TRENDS: Find rising search terms for: AI automation for business, no-code tools for entrepreneurs, digital product creation, passive income online, freelancer tools 2026.',
  '',
  '3. GUMROAD COMPETITOR GAPS: Find top digital product creators on Gumroad selling to freelancers and small business owners. What do they sell, at what prices, and most importantly — what are they NOT offering?',
  '',
  '4. REDDIT CONTENT GAPS: Search Reddit (r/Entrepreneur, r/smallbusiness, r/freelance, r/passive_income) for unanswered questions and pain points about AI tools, business automation, and productivity. Unanswered questions are ebook topics.',
  '',
  '5. EMERGING NICHES: What new categories of digital products are gaining traction in 2026 that have low competition but growing buyer interest?',
  '',
  'Return ONLY valid JSON array (no markdown fences):',
  '[{',
  '  "title": "Suggested product title",',
  '  "niche": "ebook_guide|ebook_bundle|spreadsheet_templates|notion_templates|business_documents",',
  '  "source": "Amazon KDP|Google Trends|Gumroad gap|Reddit gap|emerging niche",',
  '  "evidence": "specific data — competitor prices, review counts, trend direction",',
  '  "competitive_advantage": "why Cipher Studio can win — what gap exists",',
  '  "suggested_price": 9.99,',
  '  "estimated_demand": "high|medium|low",',
  '  "competition_level": "high|medium|low",',
  '  "keywords": ["search terms buyers use"],',
  '  "urgency": "trending_now|growing|stable|seasonal",',
  '  "etsy_search": "what a buyer would type into Etsy to find this"',
  '}]',
  '',
  'Find 5-8 opportunities from Amazon KDP, Google Trends, Gumroad, and Reddit. Be specific — actual data required.'
];

const requestBody = JSON.stringify({
  model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6',
  max_tokens: 4096,
  tools: [{ type: 'web_search_20250305', name: 'web_search' }],
  messages: [{ role: 'user', content: userLines.join('\n') }]
});

return [{ json: { requestBody } }];

const data = $('Normalize Research Data').first().json;
const dirItems = $('Fetch CEO Directives').all();
const directiveText = (dirItems.length > 0 && dirItems[0].json && !dirItems[0].json.code)
  ? dirItems.map(d => d.json.directive || '').filter(Boolean).join('. ')
  : 'Default research cycle — no specific directives.';

const systemLines = [
  'You are the Opportunity Scoring Engine for Cipher Studio.',
  '',
  'You receive raw research data from two sources: (A) Etsy marketplace intelligence gathered by searching etsy.com directly, and (B) competitive intelligence from Amazon KDP, Google Trends, Gumroad, and Reddit.',
  '',
  'Identify the TOP 5-8 product opportunities and score them rigorously.',
  '',
  'SCORING CRITERIA (1-10 each):',
  '',
  '1. DEMAND (weight: 30%)',
  '   10 = Proven massive demand (1000+ reviews on competitors, trending on Google)',
  '   7  = Strong demand (100-1000 reviews, steady search interest)',
  '   4  = Moderate demand (10-100 reviews, niche audience)',
  '   1  = Speculative (no evidence of real buyers)',
  '',
  '2. COMPETITION GAP (weight: 25%)',
  '   10 = No quality competitors (existing products are outdated or poorly made)',
  '   7  = Few quality competitors (room for a clearly better product)',
  '   4  = Moderate competition (need strong differentiation to win)',
  '   1  = Saturated (top products have 5000+ reviews and excellent quality)',
  '',
  '3. CIPHER STUDIO FIT (weight: 25%)',
  '   10 = Perfect for AI agents (text-heavy, structured, template-based)',
  '   7  = Good fit (mostly text, some design elements)',
  '   4  = Moderate fit (significant design work needed)',
  '   1  = Poor fit (requires human expertise or physical components)',
  '',
  '4. REVENUE POTENTIAL (weight: 20%)',
  '   10 = High price ($15+) with bundle potential and recurring demand',
  '   7  = Good price ($8-15) with some bundle potential',
  '   4  = Low price ($3-7) with limited upsell',
  '   1  = Race to bottom pricing, commoditized',
  '',
  'FINAL SCORE = (demand * 0.30) + (competition_gap * 0.25) + (fit * 0.25) + (revenue * 0.20)',
  'Only include opportunities with final score >= 6.5.',
  '',
  'Return ONLY valid JSON array (no markdown fences):',
  '[{',
  '  "title": "Product title optimized for search",',
  '  "niche": "ebook_guide|ebook_bundle|spreadsheet_templates|notion_templates|business_documents",',
  '  "description": "2-3 sentence product description for the listing",',
  '  "score": 8.5,',
  '  "score_demand": 9,',
  '  "score_competition_gap": 8,',
  '  "score_fit": 9,',
  '  "score_revenue": 8,',
  '  "rationale": "2-3 sentences with specific evidence",',
  '  "competitive_strategy": "How Cipher Studio beats existing competitors",',
  '  "bundle_opportunity": "What product types pair with this",',
  '  "keywords": ["search terms buyers use"],',
  '  "suggested_price": 12.99,',
  '  "etsy_search": "what a buyer types into Etsy",',
  '  "evidence": "specific data: competitor prices, review counts, trend direction"',
  '}]'
];

const userContent = [
  'CEO DIRECTIVES: ' + directiveText,
  '',
  'ETSY MARKETPLACE INTELLIGENCE (' + data.totalEtsy + ' opportunities from etsy.com web search):',
  JSON.stringify(data.etsyOpportunities),
  '',
  'AMAZON KDP + GOOGLE TRENDS + REDDIT INTELLIGENCE (' + data.totalKDP + ' opportunities):',
  JSON.stringify(data.kdpOpportunities),
  '',
  'Score all opportunities and return the top 5-8 as a JSON array.'
].join('\n');

const requestBody = JSON.stringify({
  model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6',
  max_tokens: 8192,
  system: systemLines.join('\n'),
  messages: [{ role: 'user', content: userContent }]
});

return [{ json: { requestBody } }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ title: $json.title, niche: $json.niche, description: $json.description || '', score: $json.score, score_demand: $json.score_demand, score_competition_gap: $json.score_competition_gap, score_fit: $json.score_fit, score_revenue: $json.score_revenue, rationale: $json.rationale, competitive_strategy: $json.competitive_strategy || '', bundle_opportunity: $json.bundle_opportunity || '', keywords: $json.keywords || [], suggested_price: $json.suggested_price, etsy_search: $json.etsy_search || '', evidence: $json.evidence || '', source: $json.source || 'research_agent_v3', status: 'pending' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'INSERT', record: {   id: $json.id,   title: $json.title,   niche: $json.niche,   score: $json.score,   rationale: $json.rationale,   status: 'pending',   etsy_search: $json.etsy_search || '',   keywords: $json.keywords || [] } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const allSaved = $('Extract Saved Row').all(); const opportunities = allSaved .map(item => item.json) .filter(r => !r.skip && r.title !== '_no_results'); const highScorers = opportunities.filter(o => (o.score || 0) >= 7.5); const dateStr = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }); const dirItems = $('Fetch CEO Directives').all(); const directiveText = (dirItems.length > 0 && dirItems[0].json && !dirItems[0].json.code) ? dirItems.map(d => d.json.directive || '').filter(Boolean).join('. ') : 'Default research cycle (no CEO directives active)'; const topThree = opportunities.slice(0, 3); const oppCards = topThree.map(o => '
' + '

' + (o.niche || '').toUpperCase().replace(/_/g, ' ') + '

' + '

' + (o.title || '') + '

' + '

' + (o.score || 0) + '/10

' + '

' + (o.rationale || '') + '

' + '

Price: $' + (o.suggested_price || 0) + ' · ' + (o.evidence || '') + '

' + '
' ).join(''); const html = '
' + '
' + 'CIPHER STUDIO' + '
' + '
' + '

Daily Research Report

' + '

' + dateStr + '

' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '
' + '

' + opportunities.length + '

' + '

Opportunities

' + '

' + highScorers.length + '

' + '

Auto-Triggered

' + '
' + '

CEO DIRECTIVES

' + '

' + directiveText + '

' + '
' + '

Top Opportunities

' + (oppCards || '

No high-scoring opportunities found today.

') + '

Review all in Supabase → opportunities table · cipherstudio.co

' + '
' + '
'; return [{ json: { subject: 'Research Report: ' + opportunities.length + ' opportunities | ' + dateStr, html } }];
